name: 🐛 Bug report
about: A game (or the landing page) isn't behaving correctly
title: "bug: <game-slug> — <short summary>"
labels: ["bug"]
---

## Which game?

Game slug (visible in the URL when the modal is open, e.g. `#play=snake`):

> `your-game-slug`

Or "landing page" if the bug is in the launcher itself.

## What happened?

A clear description of what went wrong.

## What did you expect?

What you thought should happen.
